title: IRGC fires warning shots at 4 ships attempting Hormuz passage 'without coordination' — vessels forced to return
snippet: The IRGC fired at four ships attempting to cross the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday night. IRIB reported the ships attempted passage 'without coordination with security forces' at 12:35 AM local time. After warnings were ignored, warning shots were fired, forcing the ships to return. This occurred simultaneously with MoU negotiations reaching a tentative agreement.
tag_reason: New IRGC warning shots incident — not covered in previous days' sources
